prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on furan (9 atoms: O, C×4, H×4) using DFT at the tier 'standard' level — B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-center integrals (no density fitting), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, via PySCF RKS. Geometry taken as-is from the user-supplied .xyz (single-point; not re-optimized at this level). SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings reported.

Key results:
• HOMO energy: −6.3597638 eV (index 17)
• LUMO energy: −0.1024036 eV (index 18)
• HOMO–LUMO gap (headline value): 6.2573602 eV

Koopmans descriptors: vertical IP = 6.3597638 eV, vertical EA = 0.1024036 eV, electronegativity = 3.2310837 eV, chemical hardness = 3.1286801 eV, electrophilicity index = 1.6684195 eV.

Integrity: trustworthy = true, all checks passed. Output JSON: furan_frontier_dft_b3lyp_def2tzvp.json. CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/furan/furan.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1.
